simple_types.name: SOURCE_CLK_SYS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SOURCE_CLK_SYS_Field is
  (TICK,
   CLK_SYS)
  with Size => 1;

array_types.name: DBGPAUSE_DBG_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type DBGPAUSE_DBG_Field_Array is array (0 .. 1) of DBGPAUSE_DBG_Element
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 2;

record_types.name: ARMED_Register
DBGPAUSE_DBG_Field
DBGPAUSE_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_0
fields.description: Pause when processor 0 is in debug mode

record_types.name: INTE_Register
INTF_Register
INTR_Register

fields.name: ALARM_0
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field.

fields.name: ALARM_1
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field.

fields.name: ALARM_2
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field.

record_types.name: INTS_Register
LOCKED_Register
PAUSE_Register
SOURCE_Register
TIMER0_Peripheral

fields.name: TIMEHW
fields.description:
Write to bits 31:0 of time writes do not get copied to time until
timehw is written

fields.name: TIMELW
fields.description: Read from bits 63:32 of time always read timelr before timehr

fields.name: TIMELR
fields.description:
Arm alarm 0, and configure the time it will fire. Once armed, the
alarm fires when TIMER_ALARM0 == TIMELR. The alarm will disarm itself
once it fires, and can be disarmed early using the ARMED status
register.

fields.name: ALARM0
fields.description:
Arm alarm 1, and configure the time it will fire. Once armed, the
alarm fires when TIMER_ALARM1 == TIMELR. The alarm will disarm itself
once it fires, and can be disarmed early using the ARMED status
register.

fields.name: ALARM1
fields.description:
Arm alarm 2, and configure the time it will fire. Once armed, the
alarm fires when TIMER_ALARM2 == TIMELR. The alarm will disarm itself
once it fires, and can be disarmed early using the ARMED status
register.

fields.name: ALARM2
fields.description:
Arm alarm 3, and configure the time it will fire. Once armed, the
alarm fires when TIMER_ALARM3 == TIMELR. The alarm will disarm itself
once it fires, and can be disarmed early using the ARMED status
register.

fields.name: ALARM3
fields.description:
Indicates the armed/disarmed status of each alarm. A write to the
corresponding ALARMx register arms the alarm. Alarms automatically
disarm upon firing, but writing ones here will disarm immediately
without waiting to fire.

fields.name: ARMED
fields.description: Raw read from bits 63:32 of time (no side effects)

fields.name: TIMERAWH
fields.description: Raw read from bits 31:0 of time (no side effects)

fields.name: TIMERAWL
fields.description:
Set bits high to enable pause when the corresponding debug ports are
active

fields.name: DBGPAUSE
fields.description: Set high to pause the timer

fields.name: PAUSE
fields.description:
Set locked bit to disable write access to timer Once set, cannot be
cleared (without a reset)

fields.name: LOCKED
fields.description:
Selects the source for the timer. Defaults to the normal tick
configured in the ticks block (typically configured to 1
microsecond). Writing to 1 will ignore the tick and count clk_sys
cycles instead.

variables.name: TIMER0_Periph
variables.code:
TIMER0_Periph : aliased TIMER0_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => TIMER0_Base;
